title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v. KOMEZUSENGE
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v. KOMEZUSENGE
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RPAA 01317/2024/CA (Umugwaneza, P.J.)
25 Gicurasi 2025]
Amategeko agenga imiburanishirize y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha – Ibimenyetso – Mu manza
nshinjabyaha, ikimenyetso gishingira ku mpamvu zose z’ibyabaye n’ibyemejwe n’amategeko,
ababuranyi bapfa kuba barahawe umwanya wo kubijyaho impaka.
Amategeko agenga imiburanishirize y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha – Kugabanya igihano – Uregwa
ntiyongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano, iyo mu bujurire Urukiko rusanga yarabigabanyirijwe
bihagije, harebwe uburemere bw’icyaha n’uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Komezusenge Evariste, Fatisuka Laurent na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi
bakurikiranyweho n’Ubushinjacyaha icyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko
bw’urumogi, nyuma yuko bafatanywe imifuka yarwo 10 ingana n’ibiro 247 bitegura kurwohereza
I Muhanga, bubaregera Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Rusizi.
Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko Fatisuka Laurent na Komezusenge Evariste bahamwa
n’icyaha cyo kubika no gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, bahanishwa buri
wese igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni
eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
Abaregwa bajuririye mu Rukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rusizi, buri wese avuga ko yahamijwe
icyaha atakoze agasaba kurenganurwa akagirwa umwere. Urwo Rukiko ruca urubanza rwemeza
ko kuri Komezusenge urubanza yajuririye rudahindutse, ko hagumyeho igihano cy’igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000
Frw) yahanishijwe ku rwego rwa mbere; naho kuri Fatisuka rwemeza ko adahamwa n’icyaha
aregwa cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge.
Komezusenge yajuririye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no
kubika ibiyobyabwenge mu buryo bugenekereje kuko nta bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho
byemeza ko yagikoze byashingiweho, hirengagizwa ibimenyetso byemeza nta gushidikanya ko
urumogi rwafashwe rutari urwe, Asaba ko yahanagurwaho icyo cyaha akagirwa umwe, Urukiko
rwaba rubibonye ukundi rukamugabanyiriza igihano kugeza ku gifungo cy’imyaka icumi (10)
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni imwe n’ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu (1.250.000
Frw).
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko ubujurire nta shingiro bufite kuko Urukiko rubanza rwagaragaje
ibimenyetso rwashingiyeho rumuhamya icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge
by’urumogi, akaba atabasha kubivuguruza. Buvuga kandi ko uregwa atakongera kugabanyirizwa
igihano kuko yagabanyirijwe agahanishwa igihano gikwiye.
Incamake y’icyemezo: 1. Mu manza nshinjabyaha, ikimenyetso gishingira ku mpamvu zose
z’ibyabaye n’ibyemejwe n’amategeko, ababuranyi bapfa kuba barahawe umwanya wo kubijyaho
impaka.

2. Uregwa ntiyongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano, iyo mu bujurire Urukiko rusanga
yarabigabanyirijwe bihagije, harebwe uburemere bw’icyaha n’uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko N° 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza
z’inshinjabyaha, Ingingo ya 108;
Itegeko N° 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso, ingingo ya 87.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
RPA 0129/10/CS; Ubushinjacyaha vs Mpitabakana rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga rwaciwe ku
wa 07/03/2014.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Rusizi, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Komezusenge Evariste,
Fatisuka Laurent na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi, icyaha cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, buvuga ko bigabanyijemo amatsinda bakajya bakora ibikorwa byo kurangura
urumogi muri DRC1, bakaza kurubika mu Rwanda, barangiza bakarucuruza mu bice bitandukanye
by’u Rwanda, batahurwa ubwo ku wa 26/09/2022 Komezusenge Evariste ari mu Murenge wa
Bushekeri yahamagaye uwitwa Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo amusaba ko yamushakira
imodoka itwara imifuka icumi (10) y’amakara iyavana mu Kagari ka Kigoya, Umurenge wa
Kanjongo, Akarere ka Nyamasheke, akayageza mu mujyi wa Muhanga ku mafaranga ibihumbi
makumyabiri na bitanu (25.000 Frw), Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo yabonye imodoka
ya Fuso yari itwawe n’umushoferi witwa Niyitanga Didier, yajyana nayo gupakira ayo makara,
bageze mu nzira bahasanga Fatisuka Laurent nawe barajyana kugira ngo ajye kwerekana aho
amakara aherereye anabahe amafaranga bakoreye.
[2] Bageze aho amakara ari, umushoferi ariwe Niyitanga Didier yagize amakenga, asatura
umufuka umwe w’amakara asanga bagiye bafata udukara duke inyuma imbere bagashyiramo undi
mufuka urimo urumogi, asanga ariko bimeze ku mifuka icumi (10) yose yari agiye gutwara, nibwo
yahise abaza Fatisuka Laurent impamvu bashaka kumwikoreza urumogi, Fatisuka Laurent abonye
ko umugambi wabo wapfubye ashaka gucika, ariko acika aburiwe na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi
wari umaze kumwandikira ubutumwa bugufi amubwira ngo nacike baje kumufata, nibwo yashatse
gucika abaturage baramufata baramugarura, naho Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo ahita
afata Moto ajya kuzana imodoka ya RIB ajya no kubereka aho urwo rumogi ruri basanga ruri mu
mifuka icumi(10), ipima ibiro 247 (247 kgs).
[3] Komezusenge Evariste, Fatisuka Laurent na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi, buri wese
yaburanye ahakana icyaha aregwa. Mu rubanza RP 00466/2022/TGI/RSZ rwaciwe ku wa
1 Demicratic Republic of Congo

29/12/2023, Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Rusizi rusanga ibiyobyabwenge byafashwe bingana
n’ibiro 247 (247 kgs) by’urumogi, ari ibya Fatisuka Laurent na Komezusenge Evariste, rusanga
kandi bari bafite ubushake bwo kubitunda ngo babijyane i Muhanga kuko bari bahereye ku munsi
wabanjirije uwo bafashweho babishakira imodoka, yamara kuboneka Fatisuka Laurent akayijyana
aho ibiyobyabwenge biri mu Murenge wa Kanjongo, ariwe uribwishyure shoferi na Hakizimana
Jean Claude wari washatse imodoka, bagezeyo shoferi akabona ko ibyo aje gutwara atari amakara
nk’uko bari babimubwiye ahubwo ari urumogi; rwemeza ko Fatisuka Laurent na Komezusenge
Evariste bahamwa n’icyaha cyo kubika no gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi,
bahanishwa buri wese igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
[4] Kuri Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi, Urukiko rwasanze icyo Ubushinjacyaha bushingiraho
bumushinja ko nawe yari mu mugambi umwe na bagenzi be baregwa hamwe, ari ubutumwa bugufi
yandikiye Fatisuka Laurent amubwira ngo ahunge batamufata, rusanga ubwo butumwa bugufi
atari ikimenyetso cyemeza ko bafatanya ibikorwa byo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge kuko
ashobora kuba yarabwanditse nta kindi agamije, maze rwemeza ko we adahamwa n’icyaha aregwa
cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge.
[5] Fatisuka Laurent na Komezusenge Evariste bajuririye urwo rubanza mu Rukiko Rukuru,
Urugereko rwa Rusizi, buri wese avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze agasaba kurenganurwa
akagirwa umwere. Ubushinjacyaha bwavuze ko ubujurire bwabo nta shingiro bufite kuko bacuriye
hamwe umugambi bashaka imodoka bajya gupakira urumogi.
[6] Mu rubanza RPA 00005/2024/HC/RSZ rwaciwe ku wa 26/11/2024, Urukiko Rukuru,
Urugereko rwa Rusizi rwasanze kuri Komezusenge Evariste hari ibimenyetso byemeza ko
akomeza guhamwa n’icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi,
birimo kuba yemera ko ariwe wamenye mbere icyo bita ikiraka cyo gupakira amakara ariko
yihunza kujyayo ahubwo asaba Fatisuka Laurent ko ari we wajyayo akajyana na shoferi, we
akabahemba ndetse agenda abarangira aho ibyo yitaga amakara biherereye anaha Fatisuka Laurent
nomero ya telefone agenda ahamagara. Rwemeza ko kuri we urubanza yajuririye rudahindutse, ko
hagumyeho igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw) yahanishijwe ku rwego rwa mbere.
[7] Kuri Fatisuka Laurent, Urukiko rwasanze hari ugushidikanya ku kuba yari azi ko agiye
gupakira urumogi kuko n’ubwo yajyanye n’umushoferi, ariko hari ugushidikanya ko yari azi ibyo
agiye gupakira no ku ruhare yari abifiteho. Kubera iyo mpamvu, rwemeza ko adahamwa n’icyaha
aregwa cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge.
[8] Komezusenge Evariste yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa RPAA
01317/2024/CA, ruburanishwa mu ruhame ku wa 09/05/2025, yunganiwe na Me Ilimubuhanga
Jean de Dieu, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Rukaka Gallican, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego
rw’Igihugu.
[9] Mu myanzuro y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Komezusenge Evariste n’umwunganira
bavuga ko yahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge mu buryo bugenekereje
kuko nta bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho byemeza ko yagikoze byashingiweho, hirengagizwa
ibimenyetso byemeza nta gushidikanya ko urumogi rwafashwe rutari urwa Komezusenge Evariste,

basaba ko yahanagurwaho icyo cyaha akagirwa umwe, Urukiko rwaba rubibonye ukundi
rukamugabanyiriza igihano kugeza ku gifungo cy’imyaka icumi (10) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni imwe n’ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu (1.250.000 Frw).
[10] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko ubujurire bwa Komezusenge Evariste nta shingiro bufite kuko
Urukiko rubanza rwagaragaje ibimenyetso rwashingiyeho rumuhamya icyaha cyo gutunda no
kubika ibiyobyabwenge by’urumogi, akaba atabasha kubivuguruza. Buvuga kandi ko
Komezusenge Evariste atakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko yagabanyirijwe agahanishwa
igihano gikwiye, cyane cyane ko nta musanzu anzanye wo korohereza ubutabera yemera icyaha
ngo nabyo bibe byashingirwaho.
[11] Hakurikijwe iyo miburanire, muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ibibazo bikurikira:
a. kumenya niba Komezusenge Evariste yarahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika
ibiyobyabwenge hashingiwe ku bimenyetso bishikanywaho;
b. kumenya niba hari ibimenyetso byirengagijwe byemeza ko urumogi rwafashwe rutari urwa
Komezusenge Evariste;
c. kumenya niba Komezusenge Evariste yagabanyirizwa ibihano.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA
a. Ibyerekeye kumenya niba Komezusenge Evariste yarahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no
kubika ibiyobyabwenge hashingiwe ku bimenyetso bishikanywaho
[12] Komezusenge Evariste na Me Ilimubuhanga Jean de Dieu umwunganira bavuga ko
yahamijwe icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge mu buryo bugenekereje kuko nta
bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho byemeza ko yagikoze byashingiweho, bagasaba ko yarenganurwa
akagirwa umwere.
[13] Komezusenge Evariste asobanura ko mu icibwa ry’urubanza rujuririrwa hagendewe ku
magambo ya Fatisuka Laurent adafitiwe gihamya, wahunze uruhare rwe rw’uburyo ariwe ubwe
washatse imodoka ahamagawe n’abo yari yahaye nomero ye ya telefone nk’umuntu ukora
umwuga w’ubukomisiyoneri, ahubwo yigaragaza nk’udafite aho ahuriye n’ibyo gushakira abantu
imodoka bakabaha ibihembo. Avuga kandi ko ku rupapuro rwa 7, igika cya 19 cy’urubanza
rujuririrwa, Urukiko rwafashe ibintu uko bitari, ruvuga ko afatwa yemeye ko urumogi ari urwe,
nyamara atari byo kuko iyo abyemera aba yarasobanuye aho ruvanwa n’aho rujyanwa.
[14] Komezusenge Evariste akomeza avuga ko nk’umuntu ukora akazi ko guhuza abafite
imodoka zipakira imizigo n’abakiriya bafite imizigo yo gupakira, ari muri urwo rwego
yahamagawe n’abantu bamusaba kumushakira imodoka ipakira amakara, ababwira ko ari mu
bukwe ariko abaha nomero z’abandi bantu bakora akazi kamwe k’ubukomisiyoneri, aribwo

bahamagaye Fatisuka Laurent abashakira imodoka, ariko mu buryo bwo kuremereza ibintu
Urukiko ruvuga ko umunsi ubanziriza ifatwa ry’urumogi yavuganye iminsi myinshi na Fatisuka
Laurent bityo ko yari azi iby’urumogi, nyamara kuba yaravuganye nawe atari ikimenyetso nyakuri
cyemeza ko bavuganaga iby’urumogi kuko nta munsi n’umwe batavuganaga, ko iyo umwe yabaga
ikiraka yahamagara undi.
[15] Komezusenge Evariste avuga kandi ko ibyo kuvuga ko yashatse imodoka n’umushoferi
akoresheje Fatisuka Laurent, ataribyo kuko atazi uwo mushoferi, bakaba batarigeze banavugana
kuri telefone. Asaba uru Rukiko gushingira ku ngingo ya 4 y’Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/08/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange no ku ngingo ya 111 y’Itegeko N° 027/2019
ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize y’imanza nshinjabyaha, rukabona ko adahamwa
n’icyaha aregwa kuko nta kimenyetso na kimwe cyemeza ko hari aho ahuriye n’urumogi aregwa
cyangwa cyemeza ko yari azi ko rugiye gupakirwa.
[16] Me Ilimubuhanga Jean de Dieu avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rusizi
rwahamije Komezusenge Evariste icyaha rushingiye ku bimenyetso bishidikanywaho, ibyo
akabishingira ku mpamvu zikurikira:
▪ Kuba Komezusenge Evariste atari we nyiri inzu yakodeshwaga yari ibitsemo urumogi
kandi akaba atanayikodeshyereza abandi bantu;
▪ Kuba umushoferi wari ugiye kutwara ibyo biyobyabwenge ntaho yagaragaje ko byatunzwe
na Komezusenge Evariste cyangwa ngo habe hari abandi batangabuhamya babyemeza
batyo;
▪ kuba uwari ubitse urumogi ariwe Ukundanundi Théogène ufite telefone: 0788495906
arwemera, kubera ko mu gika cya 12 cy’urubanza rujuririrwa Urukiko Rukuru rwemeje ko
uyu yavuganye n’umushoferi amuyobora aho imifuka irimo urumogi yari iri, ibyo
bisobanuye neza ko iyo mifuka y’urumogi itari iya Komezusenge Evariste, ahubwo yari
iy’abantu birutse kandi ko ari nabo bari barubitse ndetse ari nabo basabye Komezusenge
Evariste kubashakira umuntu uyibatwarira kubera ko bari bamuzi nk’umuntu ushakira
abantu imodoka zitwara imizigo;
▪ Kuba uwari ufite iyo mifuka ndetse wari utangiye kuyipakira ariwe Uwimana Théobald
ufite telefone: 0782245560 yaragaragaye ariko igatwererwa Komezusenge Evariste;
▪ Kuba imwe mu mpamvu yatumye Komezusenge Evariste ahamwa n’icyaha ari uko
yaganiriye kuri telefone na Fatisuka Laurent, nyamara nk’abantu baziranye nta cyari
kubabuza kuvugana kandi nta ho Ubushinjacyaha bwabashije kugaragaza ko icyo
baganiragaho ari urwo urumogi, bityo ko icyo atari ikimenyetso cyo gutunda no gucuruza
urumogi;

▪ Kuba Urukiko Rukuru rwaravuze ko Komezusenge Evariste agifatwa yemeye icyaha,
nyamara mu nyandikomvugo ze haba iyo mu Bugenzacyaha cyangwa iyo mu
Bushinjacyaha ntaho bigaragara ko yacyemeye;
▪ Kuba Komezusenge Evariste ataziranye n’abantu babiri (2) basanzwe ahari iyo mifuka
y’urumogi bahise bahunga, kuko iyo aba aziranye nabo, hari kurebwa “call history”
hakarebwa niba basanzwe bavugana ndetse n’ibikubiye mu butumwa bahanaga kuri
telefone zabo, hakanamenyekana ko Komezusenge Evariste agenda aho hantu hari habitse
iyo mifuka (aho imodoka yari kujya kuyipakira).
Ko kuba bitarakozwe, Urukiko rukihutira guhamya icyaha Komezusenge Evariste, bigaragaza ko
habayemo kugenekerera kuko nta kimenyetso kigaragaza isano iri hagati ye n’icyaha yahamijwe
cyo gutunda no gufatanwa ibiyobyabwenge, mu gihe ahantu byafatiwe ntaho ahuriye naho ndetse
n’uwari ugiye gupakira urwo rumogi arutunda atariwe wari kumuhemba ndetse atari nawe
wabimuhaye. Avuga kandi ko mu rwego rwo kumenya ukuri iyo “call history” yashakwa aho
kugira ngo umuntu w’intungane ahamwe n’icyaha kandi ntaho ahuriye nacyo.
[17] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko iyi ngingo y’ubujurire nta shingiro ifite kuko nk’uko bigaragara
mu gika cya 17 n’icya 18 by’urubanza rujurirwa, Urukiko rubanza rwagaragaje ibimenyetso
rwashingiyeho ruhamya Komezusenge Evariste icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge
by’urumogi, kugeza ubu akaba atabasha kubivuguruza.
[18] Ubushinjacyaha bukomeza buvuga ko, Fatisuka Laurent yabwije Urukiko ukuri, avuga ko
ibyo yaregwaga yabishowemo na Komezusenge Evariste, kandi na Komezusenge akaba
adahakana ko ari we watelefonye bwa mbere Fatisuka Laurent amusaba kujyana n’imodoka
gupakira urumogi bo bitaga amakara.
Uko Urukiko rubibona
[19] Ku bijyanye n’ibimenyetso mu manza nshinjabyaha, ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko N° 062/2024
ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso, ivuga ko: “Mu rubanza nshinjabyaha, ikimenyetso
gishingira ku mpamvu zose z’ibyabaye n’ibyemejwe n’amategeko, ababuranyi bapfa kuba
barahawe umwanya wo kubijyaho impaka”.
[20] Kopi y’urubanza rujurirwa, igika cya 18, igaragaza ko Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa
Rusizi rwagumishijeho icyemezo cyafashwe n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Rusizi gihamya
Komezusenge Evariste icyaha cyo gutunda no kubika ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko
bw’urumogi, hashingiwe ku kuba yemera ko ariwe wamenye mbere icyo bita ikiraka cyo gupakira
amakara ariko yihunza kujyayo ahubwo asaba Fatisuka Laurent ko ari we wajyayo akajyana na
shoferi, we akabahemba ndetse agenda abarangira aho ibyo yitaga amakara biherereye anaha
Fatisuka Laurent nomero ya telefone agenda ahamagara.
[21] Dosiye y’uru rubanza igaragaza ko Fatisuka Laurent abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha ku wa
26/09/2022, yavuze ko yahawe ikiraka na Komezusenge Evariste cyo kujyana n’imodoka gupakira
amakara mu Murenge wa Kanjongo aho bita kwa Matotwe amubwira ko impamvu atigiriyeyo ari
uko afite ubukwe. Fatisuka Laurent yakomeje avuga ko Komezusenge Evariste yamubwiye ko bari

bupakire imifunga icumi (10) y’amakara bakayavana Kanjongo bakayageza i Muhanga, ko ikiraka
muri rusange ari icy’amafaranga ibihumbi mirongo ine (40.000 Frw), ko abashoferi abaha
ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu (25.000 Frw) naho we agafata ibihumbi cumi (10.000 Frw),
ibihumbi bitanu (5.000 Frw) bisigaye akayereka Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo
akamubwira ko ariyo bakoreye. Akomeza avuga ko Komezusenge Evariste amaze kubarangira aho
amakara aherereye yasigaye ku Buhinga, bagenda bahamagarana n’umuntu ukoresha telefone:
0782245560 kugeza bageze aho amakara ari, umushoferi abonye ari imifuka mitoya agira
amakenge acamo umufaka umwe asanga harimo urumogi, basanga ariko bimeze mu mifuka yose
uko ari icumi (10).
[22] Dosiye igaragaza kandi ibazwa rya Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo mu
Bugenzacyaha ku wa 26/09/2022 no mu Bushinjacyaha ku wa 03/10/2022, wemeza ko mu gitondo
cyo kuri iyo tariki yahamagawe na Komezusenge Evariste amusaba ko yamushakira imodoka
imutwarira imifuka makumyabiri (20) y’amakata iyavana mu Murenge wa Kanjongo ikayajyana i
Muhanga, ahagaritse imodoka ya mbere umushoferi amubwira ko atatwara imifuka makumyabiri
(20) y’amakara adafite icyangombwa, umushoferi amuhamagarira mugenzi we, bageze ku
Buhinga bahasanga Komezusenge Evariste, nibwo yisubiyeho avuga ko amakara ari imifuka icumi
(10), anabwira Fatisuka Laurent ko ajyana n’iyo modoka akajya kubereka aho ayo makara
aherereye anamuha nomero za telefone z’umuntu uri buyabahe, bahageze umushoferi asatura
imufuka y’amakara basanga harimo urumogi.
[23] Dosiye y’uru rubanza igaragaza na none ibazwa rya Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi mu
Bugenzacyaha ku wa 01/11/2022, wemeza ko ku mugoroba ubanziriza ku wa 26/09/2022,
yahamagawe na Fatisuka Laurent na Komezusenge Evariste bamusaba ko yabashakira imodoka
eshatu (3) zitwara imizigo, imwe iri butware imbaho, indi igatwara amakara n’indi igatwara
ibisheke, bamubwira ko umufuka umwe w’amakara uributwarwe ku mafaranga ibihumbi bitanu
(5.000 Frw) kuwugeza i Muhanga, bukeye aho aboneye imodoka asanga babonye indi, ubwo yari
aje gupakira ibisheke mu Gatare yandikira Fatisuka Laurent ubutumwa bugufi amubwira ngo
nacike batamufata kuko yari amaze kumenya ko mu makara bagiye gupakira harimo urumogi.
[24] Muri dosiye y’uru rubanza hagaragara kandi ubuhamya bwa Niyitanga Didier, uyu akaba
ari umushoferi wari wahawe ikiraka cyo gupakira amakara yasanzwemo urumogi, wemeza ko ku
itariki ya 26/09/2022, avuye i Rusizi ageze ku Buhinga yahagaritswe n’abagabo batatu (3)
bamusaba ko yajya kubatwarira amakara bakamwishyura ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu
(25.000 Frw) ku mifuka icumi (10) y’amakara, baragiye bageze mu nzira arikumwe na Fatisuka
Laurent na Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo mu modoka, bazamura volime ya radiyo
y’imodoka yari atwaye batangira kongorerana, bituma agira amakenge bageze aho amakara ari
asatura umufuka urimo amakara asanga imbere harimo undi mufuka urimo urumogi, bigenda bityo
ku mifuka yose uko ari icumi (10), Fatisuka Laurent na Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo
babonye ko byamenyekanye bariruka abaturage bafata Fatisuka Laurent.
[25] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga imvugo za Fatisuka Laurent, Hakizimana Jean Claude
alias Gasongo, Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi na Niyitanga Didier zose zagaragajwe mu bika
bibanziriza iki, ari ibimenyetso byuzuzanya kandi byemeza nta gushidikanya ko urumogi ruvugwa
muri iyi dosiye ari urwa Komezusenge Evariste wahereye ku mugoroba wo ku itariki ya
25/09/2022 arushakira imodoka akoresheje Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi arwita ko ari amakara,
bukeye ku itariki ya 26/09/2022 abonye Tiwayi atinze kuyibona akoresha Hakizimana Jean Claude

alias Gasongo, imodoka imaze kuboneka Komezusenge Evariste yanga kujyana nayo aho amakari
ari ahubwo yoherezayo Fatisuka Laurent ngo ariwe ujyana n’iyo modoka na Hakizimana Jean
Claude alias Gasongo wari wayishatse bajye gupakira ibyo we yitaga amakara, abemera ibihembo,
anaha Fatisuka Laurent nomero za telefone z’umuntu bari bugende bavugana akabarangira aho
amakara bayasanga, bagezeyo shoferi w’imodoka yari igiye gutwara ayo amakara ariwe Niyitanga
Didier agira amakenga, asatura umufuka w’amakara agasanga imbere harimo undi mufuka urimo
urumogi, asanga ariko bimeze ku mifuka icumi (10) yose.
[26] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga iyo urumogi ruza kuba atari urwa Komezusenge Evariste
nk’uko abivuga, yakabaye agaragaza undi muntu wari wamuhaye akazi ko kurushakira imodoka,
aho kuba avuga gusa ko yahamagawe n’umuntu atazi amusaba kumushakira imodoka. Urukiko
rukaba rusanga ibyo ari amayeri yo gushaka guhunga icyaha kuko yaba abo yasabye kumushakira
imodoka aribo Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi yaba na
Fatisuka Laurent yasabye kujyana n’imodoka yari imaze kubone gupakira amayo makara, nta
n’umwe wemeza ko yigeze amubwira ko amakara arimo gushakira imodoka ari y’undi muntu,
ahubwo Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi buri wese avuga
ko yamusabye kumushakira imodoka na Fatisuka Laurent akemeza ko yamusabye kujyana
n’imodoka gupakira amakara kuko we atabonetse, byumvikanisha ko umuzigo wari uwe kuko iyo
uza kuba ari uw’undi muntu, uwo wari kuba ari nyirawo ariwe wari kujyana n’imodoka
kuwupakira, cyangwa se Komezusenge Evariste akaba yarabwiye abo yahaye akazi ko umuzigo
atari uwe.
[27] Urukiko rw’ubujurire rurasanga kuba Komezusenge Evariste atari we nyiri inzu yari
ibitsemo urumogi cyangwa ngo abe ariwe wayikodeshaga, bitamukuraho icyaha kuko ibyo
bitavuze ko urumogi rutari urwe, kubera ko nk’uko bimaze gusobanurwa mu bika bibanziriza iki,
iyo rutaba urwe atari kurushakira imodoka yo kurutwara ngo anashake n’umuntu ujyana nayo
kurupakira akanamubwira ko aribumuhembe, ntamugaragarize ko hari undi nyiri umuzigo utari
we.
[28] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi kuba umushoferi wari ugiye gutwara ibyo
biyobyabwenge ntaho yagaragaje ko byatunzwe na Komezusenge Evariste cyangwa ngo habe hari
abandi batangabuhamya babyemeza batyo, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rusanga nabyo bitamukuraho
icyaha kuko harebwe amayeri yakoresheje agashaka imodoka akoresheje abandi bantu naho
ibonekeye ntajyane nayo aho umuzigo uri ahubwo agasaba Fatisuka Laurent kujyana nayo
akamuhemba, ntaho umushoferi yari guhera amenya ko ariwe nyiri umuzigo yari agiye gutwara
wasanzwemo urumogi, n’abandi batangabuhamya bari aho nabo babonye ko ayo makara avanze
n’urumogi, nti bashoraga kumenya ko ari aya Komezusenge Evariste mugihe batahamubonye,
ariko kandi ntibikuraho ko hari ibindi bimenyetso byemeza nta shiti ko rwari urwe nk’uko
byagaragajwe mu gika cya 25 n’icya 26 by’uru rubanza.
[29] Ku bijyanye no kuvuga ko urumogi ruvugwa muri uru rubanza ari urw’abantu bari
barubitse ari nabo basabye Komezusenge Evariste kubashakira umuntu urubatwarira bakanagenda
bavugana n’umushoferi bamurangira, babonye batahuwe baracika, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga ntashingiro bifite kuko nk’uko byakomeje gusobanurwa haruguru, Komezusenge
Evariste ntabasha kugaragaza umuntu wamusabye kumushakira imodoka itwara amakara ari nayo
yagaragayemo urumogi, ahubwo nk’uko byemezwa na Zigama Joseph alias Tiwayi na Hakizimana
Jean Claude alias Gasongo, niwe wabasabye gushaka imodoka, anasaba Fatisuka Laurent kujyana

nayo anamuha nomero za telefone z’umuntu bagenda bavugana akabayobora, byumvikanisha ko
byose ariwe wari ubiri inyuma.
[30] Ku bijyanye n’imiburanire ya Komezusenge Evariste y’uko mu mpamvu zatumye ahamwa
n’icyaha harimo kuba yaracyemeye agifatwa, nyamara mu nyandikomvugo ze haba iyo mu
Bugenzacyaha cyangwa iyo mu Bushinjacyaha ntaho bigaragara ko yacyemeye, Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nta shingiro ifite kuko imikirize y’urubanza rujuririrwa ntaho igaragaza
ko Urukiko rwashingiye ku kwemera icyaha kwe, ahubwo icyo Urukiko rwagaragaje mu gika
kibanziriza icyaha 18, ni uko Komezusenge Evariste yemeye ko ariwe wamenye icyo bita ikiraka
mbere akabwira Fatisuka Laurent ko abonye akazi akamusaba ko yajyayo ndetse amuha na numero
agenda ahamagara. Ibi rero ni nako byagenze kuko nk’uko byakomeje gusobanurwa haruguru
Komezusenge Evariste ariwe watangije igikorwa cyo gushaka imodoka ijya gupakira amakara yaje
gusangwamo urumogi, aho imodoka ibonekeye asaba Fatisuka Laurent kujyana nayo.
[31] Hashingiwe ku bisobanuro byose bimaze gutangwa, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga,
Komezusenge Evariste yarahamijwe icyaha cyo kubika no gutunda ibiyobyabwenge (urumogi)
hashingiwe ku bimenyetso byuzuzanya kandi bidashidikanywaho, bityo ubujurire bwe kuri iyi
ngingo buka nta shingiro bufite.
b. Ibyerekeye kumenya niba hari ibimenyetso byirengagijwe byemeza ko urumogi
rwafashwe rutari urwa Komezusenge Evariste
[32] Me Ilimubuhanga Jean de Dieu avuga ko mu icibwa ry’urubanza rujuririrwa hirengagijwe
ibimenyetso biri muri dosiye bigaragaza nta gushidikanya ko urumogi rwafashwe rutari urwa
Komezusenge Evariste, birimo:
▪ imvugo ya Fatisuka Laurent wemeza ko igihe imifuka irimo urumogi yafatwaga abari
bayibitse bari bahari, ariko ko Komezusenge Evariste we atari ahari, ko yari ku Buhinga
kandi imifuka yarafatiwe Kirambo, akanemeza ko umuntu wari guhemba shoferi wari
gutwara iyo mifuka ari umuntu ukoresha nomero ya telefone: 0788495906, kandi iyo
nomero ikaba yanditse kuri Théogène Ukundukundi; bisobanuye neza ko Komezusenge
Evariste atari we wayifatanwe atari nawe wari uyibitse, ahubwo abari bayibitse bahise
biruka, kandi ko atariwe nyirayo kuko iyo aza kuba nyirayo nta cyari kumubuza kujyana
n’imodoka yari igiye kuyipakira kuko yari iturutse ku Buhingako aho yarari, ko rero niba
imifuka itari ibitswe na Komezusenge ndetse akaba atariwe wari kwishyura “transport”
yayo, Urukiko ntaho rwari guhera rumuhamya icyaha cyo kubika kandi ababitse bahari
(abatorotse) n’icyaha cyo gutunda kandi uwari kwishyura ikiguzi cyo gutunda ahari ariwe
Théogène Ukundukundi;
▪ imvugo z’umutangabuhamya witwa Jean Pierre Majaribu, wasobanuye ko urumogi rwari
urw’abantu babaga munzu yakuwemo imifuka y’amakara rwarimo, ibyo bikaba
bivuguruza ibyo Urukiko rwavuze ko urwo rumogi rwari urwa Komezusenge Evariste
kuko atariwe wabaga muri iyo nzu;
▪ imvugo za shoferi Niyitanga Didier wari ugiye gupakira iyo mifuka, wagaragaje ko
Komezusenge Evariste ntaho ahuriye n’ibiyobyabwenge, ahubwo ko Fatisuka Laurent na

Hakizimana Jean Claude aribo bari bazi ibirimo kuko bakibona atangiye kureba ibirimo
bahise biruka ndetse n’abahungu bazanaga iyo mifuka nabo bariruka;
▪ raporo y’ubuyobozi bw’ibanze, igaragza ko imifuka yasanzwemo urumogi yari ibitswe na
Uwimana Théobald, Shingiro Patrick na Nshimiyimana Samuel (abasore babaga mu nzu
iyo mifuka yari ibitsemo), ikanamara impaka ku bakoze icyaha cyo gutunda
ibiyobyabwenge aho igaragaza ko ari Fatisuka Laurent (wagizwe umwere) na Hakizimana
Jean Claude;
▪ raporo igaragaza abantu batorotse.
Avuga ko rero Urukiko rutari kwihutira guhamya icyaha Komezusenge Evariste kandi
hari abantu bari babitse iyo mifuka, bagatoroka, ahubwo ko abo bantu bagombaga
gushakishwa bakagaragaza ukuri, bakavuga nyiri iyo mifuka n’uwo bari bayibikiye. Ko
kuba byarirengagijwe ahubwo iyo mifuka igatwererwa Komezusenge Evariste, ari
inenge ikwiye gukosorwa byaba ngomba Urukiko rugategeka ko abo bantu bashakishwa
bagatanga ubuhamya aho guha igihano umuntu w’intungane.
[33] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko nta kimenyetso Komezusenge Evariste agaragaza cyemeza ko
ibiyobyabwenge byafashwe bitari ibye, ahubwo ko ibimenyetso biri muri dosiye bigaragaza ko
ariwe uri inyuma y’abantu bose bari bafite ibyo biyobyabwenge, ashaka kubipakira yifashishije
abandi bantu babyita amakara, akemera gutanga amafara ibihumbi makumyabiri na bitanu (25.000
Frw) yo gupakira imifunga icumi (10) gusa y’amakara.
Uko Urukiko rubibona
[34] Ingingo ya 108 y’Itegeko N° 027/2019 ryo ku wa 19/09/2019 ryerekeye imiburanishirize
y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha, ivuga ko: “Ibimenyetso bishobora gushingira ku mpamvu zose
z’ibyabaye n’ibyemejwe n’amategeko, ababuranyi bapfa kuba barabigiyeho impaka. Urukiko
ruhamya ku buryo butavuguruzwa ko ibimenyetso byose bishinja cyangwa bishinjura ari byo kandi
bishobora kwemerwa”.
[35] Dosiye y’uru rubanza igaragaza inyandikomvugo y’ibazwa rya Jean Pierre Majaribu
imbere y’Ubugenzacyaha ku wa 26/09/2022, wemeza ko ubwo yarimo guhinga munsi y’aho
bashatse gupakirira urumogi, yabonye abantu bari guhinga imbere ye birukanka nawe
arabakurikira, asanga umushoferi amaze gusatura umufuka wa mbere w’amakara asanga harimo
undi mufuka urimo urumogi, bajya kureba muyindi mifuka y’amakara yari isigaye mu nzu basanga
nayo ariko bimeze. Ku kibazo cya 2, yabajijwe nyiri urwo rumogi, avuga ko ari rw’abari
bacumbitse muri iyo nzu n’abazanye n’abashoferi kuko bahise biruka umwe muribo witwa
Hakizimana Jean Claude arafatwa arimo kwiruka.
[36] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga imvugo ya Jean Pierre Majaribu imaze kugaragaza mu
gika kibanziriza iki, itavuguruza ibimenyetso byagaragajwe mu gika cya 21 -26 cy’uru rubanza
bigizwe n’imvugo za Fatisuka Laurent, Hakizimana Jean Claude alias Gasongo na Zigama Joseph
alias Tiwayi bahamya ko Komezusenge Evariste ariwe wabasabye gushaka imodoka yo gupakira

urumogi arwita ko ari amakara, aho imodoka ibonekeye agasaba Fatisuka Laurent kujyana nayo
kujya gupakira, akanamuha nomero za telefone z’umuntu aribugende ahamagara akabarangira aho
umuzigo bawusanga. Dore ko icyo Jean Pierre Majaribu yashingiyeho avuga ko urumogi ari
urw’abari bacumbitse munzu n’abazanye na shoferi, nta bundi bumenyi yari abifiteho uretse kuba
yarabishingiye gusa ku kuba ngo barabonye bimenyekanye ko ari urumogi bakiruka, ariko kandi
Urukiko rurasanga ibyo ubwabyo bidahagije ngo hemezwe ko urumogi atari urw’uwashatse
imodoka yo kurutwara akagira amakenga akanga kujya kurupakira ahubwo agatumayo undi muntu
ariwe Fatisuka Laurent.
[37] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi kuvuga ko Komezusenge Evaritse atigeze aboneka
aho urumogi rwafatiwe, ibyo bitafatwa nk’ikimenyetso kimushinjura, ahubwo ni amayeri akomeye
yakoresheje ashaka uburyo bwose yakoresha ntihagire upfa kumenya ko afitanye isano n’urwo
rumogi, ashakisha abandi bantu bashaka imodoka yo kurutwara n’abajyana nayo kugira ngo
nibiramuka bitahuwe ko umuzigo yashakiraga imodoka yo kuwupakira ari urumogi, ataza gufatwa,
ariko biba iby’ubusaba aranafatwa.
[38] Ku bijyanye no gusaba ko abantu bari babitse imifuka y’amakara yasanzwemo urumogi
bashakishwa bakabazwa, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rushingiye ku byemejwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga
mu rubanza RPA 0101/09/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 09/03/2012, ko Urukiko
rudategetswe byanze bikunze gukora iperereza cyangwa se kubaza abatangabuhamya buri gihe
cyose uko umuburanyi abisabye mu gihe rwumvwa rwanyuzwe n’ibimenyetso rwashyikirijwe
kandi n’ababuranyi bahawe umwanya uhagije wo kubyisobanuraho2, rusanga atari ngombwa ko
bahamagazwe kuko ibimenyetso biri muri dosiye bihagije.
[39] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rushingiye ku bisobanuro byose bimaze gutangwa kuri iyi ngingo
y’ubujurire, rurasanga ibimenyetso Komezusenge Evariste avuga ko byirengagijwe nyamara
bimushinjura, bitarirengajwe nk’uko abivuga ahubwo bitavuruza ibyashingiweho mukumuhamya
icyaha byakomeje kugaragazwa haruguru, bityo ubujurire bwe kuri iyi ngingo bukaba nta shingiro
bufite.
c. Ibyerekeye kumenya niba Komezusenge Evariste yagabanyirizwa igihano
[40] Me Ilimubuhanga Jean de Dieu avuga ko Urukiko rubibonye ukundi rwagabanyiriza
igihano Komezusenge Evariste kugeza ku gifungo cy’imyaka icumi (10) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga
y’u Rwanda miliyoni imwe n’ibihumbi ijana na mirongo itanu (1.250,000 Frw) hashingiwe ku
murongo watanzwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire mu rubanza RPAA 00039/2021/CA rwaciwe ku wa
02/07/2021 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Shakabatenda Jean de Dieu, uvuga ko nta cyabuza
Urukiko rwajuririwe kongera kugabanya igihano mu gihe rusanga icyatanzwe n’Urukiko rubanza
kitaragabanyijwe mu buryo buhagije ubirebeye hamwe n’uburemere bw’icyaha cyakozwe.
[41] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko Komezusenge Evariste yakabaye yarahanishijwe igifungo cya
burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni mirongo itatu (30.000.000 Frw) ku cyaha
kimuhama cyo gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, ariko ko Urukiko mu
bushishozi bwarwo rwamugabanyirije igihano ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17)
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw), ko icyo gihano gikwiriye
2 Reba igika cya 9 cy’urubanza N° RPA 0101/09/CS rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ikirenga ku wa 09/03/2012,
haburana Ubushinjacyaha na NZAJYIBWAMI Emmanuel alias Kadogo.

kikaba kitakongera kugabanywa, cyane cyane ko nta musanzu Komezusenge Evariste azanye wo
korohereza ubutabera, yemera icyaha ngo nabyo bibe byashingirwaho.
Uko Urukiko rubibona
[42] Mu rubanza RPA 0129/10/CS rwaciwe ku wa 7/03/2014, Ubushinjacyaha buburana na
Mpitabakana, Urukiko rw’Ikirenga rwemeje ko “Uregwa atongera kugabanyirizwa ibihano, iyo
mu bujurire Urukiko rusanga yarabigabanyirijwe bihagije, harebwe uburemere bw’icyaha
n’uburyo icyaha cyakozwemo”. Uyu murongo wakomejwe gukurikizwa mu manza nyinshi zaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire kugeza na n’ubu3.
[43] Imikirize y’urubanza rujuririrwa igaragaza ko, Komezusenge Evariste yahamijwe icyaha
cyo kubika no gutunda ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, ahanishwa igifungo
cy’imyaka cumi n’irindi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000
Frw).
[44] Urukiko rw’ubujurire rurasanga harebwe amayeri akomeye Komezusenge Evariste
yakoresheje mu ikorwa ry’icyaha, aho yafashe imifuka y’amakara mo imbere gashyiramo
urumogi, yarangiza akajya agenda akoresha abandi bantu kugira ngo bitaza kumenyeka ko
urumogi ari urwe, uretse ko byabaye iby’ubusa bikarangira bimenyekanye, hakarebwa ubwinshi
bw’ibiyobyabwenge yabitse yari agiye gutunda (247kgs), kugeza ubu akaba adashaka kwemera
icyaha, ku cyicuza no kugisabira imbabazi; Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga igihano yahawe
cyaragabanyijwe bihagije kikaba kitakongera kugabanywa.
[45] Hashingiwe ku bisobanuro byose byatanzwe muri uru rubanza, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
rurasanga ubujurire bwa Komezusenge Evariste nta shingiro bufite, urubanza yarujuririye rukaba
rugumyeho mu ngingo zarwo zose.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[46] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Komezusenge Evaritse nta shingiro bufite;
[47] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 00005/2024/HC/RSZ rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko
rwa Rusizi ku wa 26/11/2024, rudahindutse;
[48] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga
y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw) Komezusenge Evariste yahanishijwe muri urwo
rubanza kigumyeho.
[49] Rutegetse ko Komezusenge Evariste asonewe gutanga amagarama y’urubanza kuko
aburana afunze.
3 Reba urubanza N° RPAA 00330/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 24/01/2025 haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na NYABYENDA Evariste (igika cya 22), urubanza N° RPAA 00437/2023/CA, rwaciwe ku
wa 19/03/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha na MUKAGATARE Annonciatha (igika cya 34) n’izindi
